title: senecio riograndensis
intro: Senecio riograndensis, also known as Rio Grande ragwort, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily its hepatoprotective and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to the sesquiterpene lactones present in its leaves. The health benefits of Senecio riograndensis include its potential to protect the liver from damage, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal tea, infusions, or tinctures, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
